title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 184.827 - Museum and cultural district board, members
text:
184.827.  Museum and cultural district board, members. — A museum and cultural district created pursuant to sections 184.800 to 184.880 shall be governed by a board of directors consisting of five members who shall be elected as provided in section 184.830.
(L. 1998 H.B. 1905, A.L. 2013 S.B. 23)
